name: @stbr/tokenized-vault-standard
description: Solana Vault Standard (SVS) — ERC-4626 tokenized vaults for Solana. SVS-1/SVS-2 (public), SVS-3/SVS-4 (confidential)

scripts.test-svs1:all: npm run test-svs1:basic && npm run test-svs1:slippage && npm run test-svs1:multi-user && npm run test-svs1:edge-cases && npm run test-svs1:inflation-attack && npm run test-svs1:live-balance && npm run test-svs1:withdraw-mint && npm run test-svs1:view-functions && npm run test-svs1:full-drain
scripts.test-svs2:all: npm run test-svs2:basic && npm run test-svs2:slippage && npm run test-svs2:multi-user && npm run test-svs2:edge-cases && npm run test-svs2:inflation-attack && npm run test-svs2:sync && npm run test-svs2:sync-timing-attack && npm run test-svs2:stored-balance && npm run test-svs2:view-functions
scripts.test-svs3:all: npm run test-svs3:basic && npm run test-svs3:configure-account && npm run test-svs3:confidential-deposit && npm run test-svs3:confidential-redeem && npm run test-svs3:confidential-withdraw && npm run test-svs3:edge-cases && npm run test-svs3:view-functions
scripts.test-svs4:all: npm run test-svs4:basic && npm run test-svs4:sync-confidential && npm run test-svs4:sync-timing-attack && npm run test-svs4:confidential-redeem && npm run test-svs4:edge-cases
scripts.test-devnet:all: npm run test-svs1:all && npm run test-svs2:all && npm run test-svs3:all && npm run test-svs4:all
